name: NIST Cybersecurity Framework 2.0: Quick-Start Guide
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: NIST CSWP 30 — quick-start guide for using the NIST Cybersecurity Framework 2.0.
relationToCloudSecurity: General cybersecurity guidance applicable to cloud-environment design and operations.
relationToAISecurity: Foundational cybersecurity guidance; applies to AI system implementations.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).

current_extraction.notes: Applied the generic section extractor to cswp-30: 34 headings captured, 7 with identifiers via the numeric/statute/pillar/chapter patterns. Per-section appendix-table parsing (where applicable, especially for 800-30 r1's assessment-scale tables) is a follow-up that would emit a separate per-table CSV alongside the section table.
